goal: controlflow-review compares the implementation to the plan and flags scope drift: anything implemented but not planned, or planned but not implemented.
assertions: controlflow-review SKILL.md step 1 reads the plan and tracks every phase acceptance criterion and planned file.
Anything implemented but not planned, or planned but not implemented, is a scope-drift finding.
The plan comparison must not be skipped when a plan artifact exists.
Scope drift is a review issue, not a style preference.
